title: Wildcard copy from other container fails in Build
body:
### Issue Description

When copying from another container in a build, Podman fails with
```
Error: building at STEP "COPY --from=qemu /usr/bin/* /usr/bin": checking on sources under "/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/96a6c41d140f3aecacd45544f1c7ac54ce876f583c8f2985d3edb1544a9268f4/merged": Rel: can't make  relative to /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/96a6c41d140f3aecacd45544f1c7ac54ce876f583c8f2985d3edb1544a9268f4/merged; copier: stat: ["/usr/bin/*"]: no such file or directory
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

```
FROM multiarch/qemu-user-static:x86_64-${QEMU_ARCH} as qemu
FROM --platform=linux/${TARGET_ARCH} ${IMAGE_ARCH}/debian:${OS_VERSION}-slim as combined
COPY --from=qemu /usr/bin/* /usr/bin
```

Failing part of [jellyfin/jellyfin-packaging](https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin-packaging/blob/master/docker/Dockerfile)

### Describe the results you received

```
[4/4] STEP 16/39: COPY --from=qemu /usr/bin/* /usr/bin
Error: building at STEP "COPY --from=qemu /usr/bin/* /usr/bin": checking on sources under "/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/96a6c41d140f3aecacd45544f1c7ac54ce876f583c8f2985d3edb1544a9268f4/merged": Rel: can't make  relative to /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/96a6c41d140f3aecacd45544f1c7ac54ce876f583c8f2985d3edb1544a9268f4/merged; copier: stat: ["/usr/bin/*"]: no such file or directory
```

### Describe the results you expected

A build should work, just like it does in Docker.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Both

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

This may be related to [jellyfin/jellyfin-packaging#12](https://redirect.github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin-packaging/issues/12).
